texto: Desert heat or not, the idea that my younger self was facing her last moments was a bucket of cold water in the face. I didn’t like her, but she appeared to have her shit together in a way I hadn’t for a long time, and she had, frankly, deserved better than me. I tried to wet my lips, had nothing to do it with and croaked, “Sorry.” “Don’t be sorry. Be good. Be right. Be a hero.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a C.E. Murphy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Desert heat or not, the idea that my younger self was facing her last moments was a bucket of col…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, growing-up, responsibility pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de responsibility.

I didn’t like her, but she appeared to have her shit together in a way I hadn’t for a long time, and she had, frankly, deserved better than me. I tried to wet my lips, had nothing to do it with and croaked, “Sorry.” “Don’t be sorry. Be good. Be right. Be a hero.

texto: You ever get the feeling your life is a string festooned with bells and tie4d to hundreds of others you don't know anything about? And that sometimes somebody pulls their string, and your bells ring?" Gary looked at me a long moment before rather gently saying, "Yes and no, darlin'. We all get that feeling from time to time. Difference is, with you, it could be real.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de C.E. Murphy que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. texto: Logic was puny in the face of my wrath. Logic was puny and magic was mighty: I had just gotten rebirthed, refilled and renewed, and was fast on my way to resentful.

texto: All thinking things fear. Sentience, perhaps, is facing that fear and conquering it rather than succumbing. A tiger will drown in a tar pit, but a man who can clear his thoughts may survive.

texto: To my embarrassment, I was crying again. Real girl tears for the second time, these ones born out of frustration. That didn't happen to me very often, but I hated it when it did. It was faulty wiring in the female body, tear ducts attached directly to the frustration meter. Trying to explain to men that no, I wasn't being manipulative, I just couldn't stop my eyes from leaking salt water, only added to the aggravation.
explicacao: Citação de C.E. Murphy sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “To my embarrassment, I was crying again. Real girl tears for the second time, these ones born out…” articula tempo, frustration, tears em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como tears.
